prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年南开大学在上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约3653名、3506名、3404名、3998名、4096名。2021–2023年位次呈小幅前移趋势（从3653升至3404），但2024年起明显后移，2024年较2023年后移约594名，2025年进一步后移至4096名，近两年累计后移约692名；2025年基准位次约4096名；该校在上海市综合类招生计划：2021年12人、2022年11人、2023年14人、2024年16人、2025年17人，呈持续扩招趋势；2026年计划招生19人，较2025年再增2人（+11.8%），扩招力度加大，对竞争格局有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南开大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2023年第20名、2024年第21名、2025年第23名、2026年第21名，整体稳定在Top20–21区间，属于国内顶尖高校层次；2026年高考周期内南开大学声誉评价为「明显负面」，涉及学术不端（生命科学学院院长论文造假被免职、多位教师被实名举报）、师德师风等事件，事件统计总数8件中负面7件；抖音热度排名第36位（较热），综合热度约128万，关注度中等偏上。历史投档异常方面，2022年曾出现河南断档记录，2023年有师德师风相关中性舆情。整体声誉信号偏负面，可能对报考心理产生一定抑制作用；第五轮学科评估中，南开大学拥有A+学科4个（化学、工商管理、应用经济学、数学），A学科9个（世界史、中国史、中国语言文学、政治学、物理学、理论经济学、生物学、统计学、马克思主义理论），A-学科1个（环境科学与工程），A类学科共计14个，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，金融/财经/经济类分化观望；南开大学在沪招生专业涵盖金融学类、经济学类、理科试验班（数学与大数据/物理与光电/伯苓班）、工科试验班（未来产业精英）、中国语言文学类等，与当前热门专业方向匹配度较高。上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人（普通高考口径），较2025年49276人增加约35.4%，竞争显著加剧；南开大学位于天津市，在上海市招生人数从2021年12人增至2026年19人，招生占比逐年提升；上海考生对京津地区高校认可度较高，地域偏好因素总体中性偏正面。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年持续后移趋势（2025年基准4096名）、2026年招生计划继续扩招（+11.8%）、2026年声誉明显负面（学术不端事件可能抑制报考热情）、上海市考生总数大幅增加（+35.4%竞争加剧）、软科排名略有回升（第23→21）等关键因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基础上继续后移。经，预测最低位次约4435名，波动区间3935–4935名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班（数学与大数据）
- 理科试验班（卓越拔尖计划伯苓班）
- 金融学类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 经济学类
- 理科试验班（物理与光电信息技术工程）
- 工科试验班（未来产业精英）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 中国语言文学类。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间3935–4935名内，建议以二档专业（经济学类、理科试验班物理方向、工科试验班）为主攻方向，一档专业（数学与大数据、伯苓班、金融学类）作为冲刺，三档专业（中国语言文学类）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间上限（<3935名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间下限（>4935名）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Nankai University in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 3653, 3506, 3404, 3998, and 4096 respectively. Rankings showed a slight upward trend from 2021 to 2023 (from 3653 to 3404), but significantly declined from 2024 onward, with a drop of about 594 places in 2024 compared to 2023, and further dropping to 4096 in 2025, a cumulative decline of about 692 places over the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4096. The enrollment plan for Nankai University in Shanghai's comprehensive category: 12 students in 2021, 11 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 16 in 2024, and 17 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The planned enrollment for 2026 is 19 students, an increase of 2 students (+11.8%) compared to 2025, with intensified expansion, which will exacerbate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities: 20th in 2021–2023, 21st in 2024, 23rd in 2025, and 21st in 2026, overall stable in the Top 20–21 range, belonging to the top-tier domestic universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Nankai University's reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', involving academic misconduct (the dean of the College of Life Sciences was dismissed for paper fraud, multiple teachers were publicly reported), teacher ethics and other incidents, with 7 negative out of 8 total incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 36th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.28 million, indicating moderate to high attention. In terms of historical admission anomalies, there was a record of a gap in Henan in 2022, and neutral public opinion related to teacher ethics in 2023. Overall reputation signals are negative, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Nankai University has 4 A+ disciplines (Chemistry, Business Administration, Applied Economics, Mathematics), 9 A disciplines (World History, Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Political Science, Physics, Theoretical Economics, Biology, Statistics, Marxist Theory), and 1 A- discipline (Environmental Science and Engineering), totaling 14 A-level disciplines, with strong disciplinary strength, providing continuous attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, while Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics are differentiated and wait-and-see. Nankai University's enrollment majors in Shanghai include Finance, Economics, Science Experimental Classes (Mathematics and Big Data/Physics and Optoelectronics/Boling Class), Engineering Experimental Classes (Future Industry Elite), and Chinese Language and Literature, which have a high match with current popular major directions. The total number of college entrance examination candidates in Shanghai in 2026 is about 66,700 (regular college entrance examination caliber), an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, with enrollment numbers in Shanghai increasing from 12 in 2021 to 19 in 2026, with the enrollment proportion increasing year by year. Shanghai candidates have a high recognition of universities in the Beijing-Tianjin region, and regional preference factors are generally neutral to slightly positive.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous decline in historical rankings over the past two years (baseline 4096 in 2025), continued expansion of enrollment plan in 2026 (+11.8%), significantly negative reputation in 2026 (academic misconduct incidents may suppress application enthusiasm), a substantial increase in the number of candidates in Shanghai (+35.4% intensifying competition), and a slight recovery in the Shanghai Ranking (23rd to 21st), it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to decline from the 2025 baseline. After analysis, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4435, with a fluctuation range of 3935–4935.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data)
- Science Experimental Class (Excellence Top-notch Plan Boling Class)
- Finance.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Economics
- Science Experimental Class (Physics and Optoelectronic Information Technology Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Industry Elite).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Chinese Language and Literature.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3935–4935, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Economics, Science Experimental Class Physics direction, Engineering Experimental Class) as the main target, Tier 1 majors (Mathematics and Big Data, Boling Class, Finance) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Chinese Language and Literature) as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<3935), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (>4935), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a backup.
